'''wokathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eparchial|eparchial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eparchial|eparchial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wokathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokathithi|wokathithi]] || [[word:wokathiji|wokathiji]] || [[word:wokathishi|wokathishi]] || [[word:wokathiki|wokathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokathuthuthu|wokathuthuthu]] || [[word:wokathujuju|wokathujuju]] || [[word:wokathushushu|wokathushushu]] || [[word:wokathukuku|wokathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokathuthu|wokathuthu]] || [[word:wokathuju|wokathuju]] || [[word:wokathushu|wokathushu]] || [[word:wokathuku|wokathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokathufthuf|wokathufthuf]] || [[word:wokathufjuf|wokathufjuf]] || [[word:wokathufshuf|wokathufshuf]] || [[word:wokathufkuf|wokathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokathethe|wokathethe]] || [[word:wokatheje|wokatheje]] || [[word:wokatheshe|wokatheshe]] || [[word:wokatheke|wokatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokathothotho|wokathothotho]] || [[word:wokathojojo|wokathojojo]] || [[word:wokathoshosho|wokathoshosho]] || [[word:wokathokoko|wokathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokathotho|wokathotho]] || [[word:wokathojo|wokathojo]] || [[word:wokathosho|wokathosho]] || [[word:wokathoko|wokathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokathofthof|wokathofthof]] || [[word:wokathofjof|wokathofjof]] || [[word:wokathofshof|wokathofshof]] || [[word:wokathofkof|wokathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfthĂŻf|wokathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfjĂŻf|wokathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfshĂŻf|wokathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfkĂŻf|wokathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|wokathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|wokathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|wokathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|wokathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfthĂŻf|wokathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfjĂŻf|wokathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfshĂŻf|wokathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfkĂŻf|wokathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfthĂŻf|wokathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfjĂŻf|wokathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfshĂŻf|wokathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wokathĂŻfkĂŻf|wokathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokathĂŠthĂŠ|wokathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wokathĂŠjĂŠ|wokathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wokathĂŠshĂŠ|wokathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wokathĂŠkĂŠ|wokathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokathathatha|wokathathatha]] || [[word:wokathajaja|wokathajaja]] || [[word:wokathashasha|wokathashasha]] || [[word:wokathakaka|wokathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokathatha|wokathatha]] || [[word:wokathaja|wokathaja]] || [[word:wokathasha|wokathasha]] || [[word:wokathaka|wokathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokathafthaf|wokathafthaf]] || [[word:wokathafjaf|wokathafjaf]] || [[word:wokathafshaf|wokathafshaf]] || [[word:wokathafkaf|wokathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wokathasha|wokathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokathshĂ«sha|wokathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokathrosha|wokathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokathmusha|wokathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokathyasha|wokathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokathnkshĂ«sha|gowokathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokathnkrosha|gowokathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokathnkmusha|gowokathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokathnkyasha|gowokathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wokakathasha|wokakathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokakathshĂ«sha|wokakathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokakathrosha|wokakathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokakathmusha|wokakathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokakathyasha|wokakathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokakathnkshĂ«sha|gowokakathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokakathnkrosha|gowokakathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokakathnkmusha|gowokakathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokakathnkyasha|gowokakathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wekĂŠthasha|wekĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wekĂŠthshĂ«sha|wekĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wekĂŠthrosha|wekĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wekĂŠthmusha|wekĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wekĂŠthyasha|wekĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowekĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gowekĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowekĂŠthnkrosha|gowekĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowekĂŠthnkmusha|gowekĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowekĂŠthnkyasha|gowekĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wokfathasha|wokfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokfathshĂ«sha|wokfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokfathrosha|wokfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokfathmusha|wokfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokfathyasha|wokfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokfathnkshĂ«sha|gowokfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokfathnkrosha|gowokfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokfathnkmusha|gowokfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokfathnkyasha|gowokfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
